# Reparent Yourself — The Neuroscience Guide to Healing Your Inner Child

> A neuroscience-based guide to healing the inner child, rewiring attachment patterns,
> and finally becoming the adult your younger self needed. Features the original 8-step
> REPARENT Framework developed from van der Kolk, Siegel, Schore, Porges, Neff, Main,
> Hayes, and Levine. 25 cited studies. 250 pages. Go Deeper Series Book 6.

## Book

- Title: Reparent Yourself
- Subtitle: The Neuroscience-Based Guide to Healing Your Inner Child, Rewiring Attachment Patterns, and Finally Becoming the Adult Your Younger Self Needed
- Publisher: Go Deeper Series
- ISBN: 978-0-000000-10-9 (Paperback) | 978-0-000000-11-6 (eBook)
- Purchase: https://www.reparentyourselfbook.xyz
